name: skill-doctor
description: Static lint over Claude Code skill files. Catches invalid frontmatter, broken script references, orphan scripts, description collisions (Jaccard ≥ 0.5), and dark skills (no trigger phrases). Mechanical checks only — pair with setup-audit for semantic review of whether your rules earn their keep. Includes an optional routing-eval CLI that tests whether Claude actually picks the right skill for real intents.
